productTiers.name: Builder
productTiers.description: Weekly 30-min async coaching via Loom videos, private Discord community access, monthly group Q&A call, and AI prompt templates library. Best for beginners testing ideas.

productTiers.name: Founder
productTiers.description: Bi-weekly 1:1 strategy calls (30 min), priority Discord support (24-48hr response), custom prompt engineering, access to templates and case study library, monthly group mastermind. Best for active builders launching products.

productTiers.name: Accelerator
productTiers.description: Weekly 1:1 calls (45 min), hands-on live coding sessions (2x/month), white-glove prompt customization, direct Slack access, pre-launch review and feedback. Best for solopreneurs ready to scale.

leadMagnet.name: 7-Day AI App Blueprint
leadMagnet.description: Email course with day-by-day walkthrough of building your first app with AI tools, plus downloadable tool comparison chart (Lovable vs Cursor vs Bolt). Low-friction entry point to our community.

# Build Without Code - Business Setup Report

## Executive Summary
This report outlines the critical manual setup steps required to launch **Build Without Code** with all core business infrastructure operational. All four components must be completed before going live.

---

## 1. NETLIFY DEPLOYMENT: Landing Page

### Objective
Deploy `landing-page.html` to a live Netlify domain for public access.

### Step-by-Step Instructions

#### Phase 1: Prepare Your Repository
1. Create a GitHub account at **https://github.com/signup** (if you don't have one)
2. Create a new repository named `build-without-code`
3. Set repository visibility to **Public**
4. Clone the repository to your local machine:
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/[YOUR-USERNAME]/build-without-code.git
   ```
5. Place `landing-page.html` in the root directory of the cloned repository
6. Create a `README.md` file with basic project description
7. Commit and push files to GitHub:
   ```bash
   git add .
   git commit -m "Initial commit: Add landing page"
   git push origin main
   ```

#### Phase 2: Connect Netlify
1. Go to **https://app.netlify.com**
2. Click **"Sign up"** and choose **"Sign up with GitHub"**
3. Authorize Netlify to access your GitHub account
4. Click **"Add new site"** → **"Import an existing project"**
5. Select **GitHub** as your Git provider
6. Find and select the `build-without-code` repository
7. Configure build settings:
   - **Base directory**: Leave blank
   - **Build command**: Leave blank
   - **Publish directory**: Leave blank (root directory)
8. Click **"Deploy site"**

#### Phase 3: Configure Custom Domain (Optional but Recommended)
1. In Netlify dashboard, go to **Site settings** → **Domain management**
2. Click **"Add custom domain"**
3. Enter your domain name (e.g., `buildwithoutcode.com`)
4. Follow DNS configuration instructions for your domain registrar
5. Update DNS records as specified by Netlify (typically CNAME or A records)
6. Allow 24-48 hours for DNS propagation

#### Phase 4: Verify Deployment
- **Test URL**: Your Netlify site is live at `https://[your-site-name].netlify.app`
- Open the URL in a browser and confirm landing page loads correctly
- Check all links and CTAs function properly
- Test form submissions (if included)

### Key Details
- **Live URL format**: `https://[project-name].netlify.app`
- **Deployment is automatic** when you push to the `main` branch
- **HTTPS is enabled by default**

---

## 2. GUMROAD ACCOUNT SETUP & PRODUCT LISTING

### Objective
Create a Gumroad seller account and list your digital products for sale.

### Step-by-Step Instructions

#### Phase 1: Account Creation
1. Go to **https://gumroad.com/creators**
2. Click **"Start selling"**
3. Sign up with email or social account
4. Verify your email address
5. Complete your creator profile:
   - **Name**: Your name or brand
   - **Username**: Handle for your Gumroad URL (e.g., `@buildwithoutcode`)
   - **Bio**: Brief description (100-150 characters)
   - **Profile picture**: Upload logo/headshot (recommended size: 400x400px)
   - **Email**: Your primary contact email

#### Phase 2: Add Payment Method
1. Go to **Settings** → **Payouts**
2. Click **"Add a payout method"**
3. Select your country and bank account type
4. Enter banking details (account number, routing number, etc.)
5. For US: You may need to add a W-9 tax form
6. Verify and confirm your payout account
7. **Note**: Gumroad will deposit earnings weekly to your connected bank account
